In @.polaris/clusters/POL-547/state.json at line 20, Replace the hard-coded /Users/lsctech/... values in the durable artifact fields of the committed cluster state with repository-relative paths. Update artifact_dir, result_file, packet_path, expected_result_path, result_artifact_path, telemetry_path, and manifest_path while preserving each field’s referenced artifact location.
